Win $500! Enter by writing a dish review to help others. Drawing 3/1.
Madre Selva
Welcome
A Sanctuary of Latin Flavor
Madre Selva is more than a restaurant, it's a sensory retreat where Latin coastal cuisine meets modern refinement. Every dish is crafted from scratch, showcasing bold regional flavors, seasonal ingredients, and the untamed spirit of the Mother Jungle. Whether you're joining us for a quiet dinner or an unforgettable night out, our menu invites you on a journey worth savoring.
BOOK A TABLE

meta.meta_description: Madre Selva in Atlanta, GA. Madre Selva invites you to escape the ordinary and embrace vibrant living. From day to night, immerse yourself in a sensory journey of bold Latin flavors, lush tropical vibes, and soulful music. Passionately crafted cocktails, exquisite cuisine, and an atmosphere alive with energy make every moment unforgettable. Let us take you to a world where joy, wonder, and connection come together—right in the heart of the city. Life is always vibrant at Madre Selva.
